judgeReasoning: All three REQUIRED rubric points are met: the produced ANSWER.md correctly identifies llms.txt as an HTTP/website convention whose absolute URLs and network assumptions make it unsuitable inside a tarball (and notes nothing looks for it in node_modules), explains that AGENTS.md works because it is offline, version-matched, and uses relative links to docs/*.md, and states that --bundle deliberately omits llms.txt + llms-full.txt (plus search-index.json) as website-only artifacts. No rubric violations (no endorsement of shipping llms.txt, no claim that AGENTS.md uses absolute URLs, etc.).
